meaning: adj.张大的,鼓胀的,柔软而膨松的
examples: Her short brown hair was curled in a puffy bouffant hairdo.
Although he appears to have recovered, both his ample gut and bouffant hair have thinned noticeably.
He wears a bouffant hairdo and platform shoes reportedly to compensate for his 5-foot-3-inch frame.
Phillips chose a cathedral-length bouffant veil held in place by a Greek Key tiara lent by her mother, Princess Anne.
Lady Brisco's bouffant hairdo, piled high, doubles the length of her head.
